name: public_safety_sensor_fusion_upgrade_millhaven_st_lt
premise: A protest perimeter is tightening; legal advisers disagree on whether a new cordon meets constitutional muster under current case law. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety sensor fusion upgrade millhaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mei Okoye
agents.identity: I am Mei Okoye, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Serrano
agents.identity: I am Harper Serrano, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so long term does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so short term does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Mei Okoye must choose under short term versus long term. What does Mei Okoye do?
